candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue label; preferred over duplicate total row.
Duplicate total revenue row; usable fallback if needed.

variables.notes: Used priority list for revenue label changes/duplication over time.

candidates.why: Best match for direct production/service input costs on this mining income statement; appears below revenue and before operating result.

variables.notes: Candidate list for COGS was empty. Selected from full preview because 'Materials, supplies, and external services' is the clearest direct cost row and semantically matches cost of sales, but manual review is warranted since the label is not explicitly 'Cost of sales'.

candidates.why: Clear overhead bucket and not a total/subtotal.
Candidate provided, but this looks like direct production input cost and is better mapped to COGS, so excluded from SG&A.
Not an income statement expense row, so not suitable for SG&A.

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A total row exists, so selected the best overhead component rows. Excluded 'Materials, supplies, and external services' as COGS/direct cost. No separate R&D row found to include.
No dedicated research and development expense line appears in the provided income statement.

candidates.why: Most specific interest expense line and preferred over broader finance expense.
Broader finance expense line; useful fallback when specific interest line is unavailable.
Specific interest-related line, but values shown are zero and it captures only lease interest, not total interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental lease-interest disclosure rather than main reported interest expense.
Balancing row, not a preferred reported expense line.

variables.notes: Priority list uses the specific interest expense line first, then broader financial expenses as fallback for years where the specific line is absent.

candidates.row_label: Total equity attributable to shareholders of the parent company
candidates.why: Best book equity measure because it excludes non-controlling interests.
Usable only if no parent-equity line existed; here it duplicates parent equity.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity

candidates.why: Entire balance sheet total, not equity.

final_choice.row_label: Total equity attributable to shareholders of the parent company

variables.notes: Selected owner/parent equity to avoid double counting any non-controlling interests.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Candidate provided, but this is an income statement comprehensive income line, not a balance sheet minority interest/equity line.

variables.notes: No balance sheet line for minority interest/non-controlling interests is present. Total Equity equals equity attributable to shareholders of the parent company, indicating no separate MIB reported.
